articles.title: Best Crypto to Buy Now 14 April – ARB, APT, ADA
articles.description: The cryptocurrency market has experienced a notable upswing, primarily driven by recent inflation data and a significant Ethereum network upgrade. Bitcoin, which has surged 80% this year, hit an intraday high of $31,046 earlier today, a level not seen since June of the previous year--mprompting speculation of a new bull market. In light of this development, what are the best cryptos...

articles.title: Ethereum Rival Solana (SOL) Officially Rolls Out New Crypto-Friendly Mobile Phone ‘Saga’
articles.description: The company behind the Ethereum (ETH) challenger Solana (SOL) says its flagship phone Saga is now available and will start shipping within the month. During the Saga Launch Event in San Francisco on Thursday, Solana Labs co-founder Anatoly Yakovenko says the tech firm will start rolling out the crypto-friendly smartphone to those who pre-ordered on […]

articles.title: Avalanche Surges to 6-Month High in Daily Active Addresses
articles.description: The spike in daily active addresses coincided with a bevy of financial institutions joining Avalanche’s Evergreen subnet “Spruce.”

articles.title: Uniswap DAO approves proposal to deploy v3 on Polygon zkEVM
articles.description: Uniswap DAO approved a governance proposal to deploy Uniswap v3 on Polygon zkEVM, a Layer 2 network compatible with Ethereum.
